internal_issues.description: Cross-WIN: 16 monitoring=none WINs (001,013,022,033,040,041,042,043,048,052,054,059,060,063,066,067) contained boilerplate claiming 'monitor script hardcodes the target number on the same commit as the data-fetch line' — factually false for WINs with no monitor script. All 16 patched this run.

WIN-009 detail_verdict_text: 'data-fetch line' phrasing implied a separate data-fetch exists; WIN-009 is monitoring=hardcoded with no fetch step. Fixed to 'hardcodes both the predicted and the observed values — there is no independent data-fetch step'.

WIN-009 detail_evidence missing MT/Schumann bridge sentence. Defender escape: 'telluric MT is different from atmospheric Schumann.' Bridge sentence added: MT ELF signals are the same cavity modes coupled into the ground.
WIN-009 detail_verdict_text: source list '(IGRF, NASA station archives, ocean-tide gauges, telluric records, etc.)' replaced with 'published MT and ELF spectral literature'.

WIN-050 detail_evidence residual two-bulge sentence missed by prior run (ISS-1861 covered TLDRs and detail_verdict_text). 'Two nearly symmetric bulges' describes M2 semidiurnal, not O1 diurnal. Replaced with correct diurnal mechanism.
